# 股利計算器 GULICALC

> 台灣存股族專用的免費線上計算工具站。提供股利／殖利率、複利、定期定額、回本、房貸、薪資、所得稅等試算器，所有計算在瀏覽器完成、不收集個人資料。內容聚焦台股高股息 ETF（0050、0056、00878、00919、00929、00939、00940 等）與金融股、權值股的配息試算與存股策略。

## 計算工具

- [股利／殖利率計算器](https://gulicalc.com/): 輸入股價、張數、每股股利，立即算出總股利與殖利率
- [存股複利計算器](https://gulicalc.com/compound-calculator): 模擬長期複利成長效果
- [定期定額試算器](https://gulicalc.com/dca-calculator): 每月定投長期成果，含通膨調整
- [存股回本計算器](https://gulicalc.com/payback-calculator): 幾年靠股利回本
- [房貸計算機](https://gulicalc.com/mortgage-calculator): 月付金與年度本息對照
- [薪資計算器](https://gulicalc.com/salary): 勞健保、勞退提撥後實領薪資
- [所得稅試算](https://gulicalc.com/tax-calculator): 股利所得稅與扶養抵減試算

## 熱門 ETF 配息計算

- [0050 元大台灣50](https://gulicalc.com/articles/0050-dividend-calculator)、[0056 元大高股息](https://gulicalc.com/articles/0056-dividend-calculator)、[006208 富邦台50](https://gulicalc.com/articles/006208-dividend-calculator)
- [00878 國泰永續高股息](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00878-dividend-calculator)、[00919 群益台灣精選高息](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00919-dividend-calculator)、[00929 復華台灣科技優息](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00929-dividend-calculator)
- [00939 統一台灣高息動能](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00939-dividend-calculator)、[00940 元大台灣價值高息](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00940-dividend-calculator)
- [00900 富邦特選高股息30](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00900-dividend-calculator)、[00915 凱基優選高股息30](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00915-dividend-calculator)、[00918 大華優利高填息30](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00918-dividend-calculator)

## 個股配息計算（金融股／權值股）

- [台積電 2330](https://gulicalc.com/articles/tsmc-dividend-calculator)、[鴻海 2317](https://gulicalc.com/articles/hon-hai-dividend)、[聯發科 2454](https://gulicalc.com/articles/mediatek-dividend)、[中華電 2412](https://gulicalc.com/articles/chunghwa-telecom-dividend)
- [國泰金 2882](https://gulicalc.com/articles/cathay-financial-dividend)、[富邦金 2881](https://gulicalc.com/articles/fubon-financial-dividend)、[中信金 2891](https://gulicalc.com/articles/ctbc-financial-dividend)、[第一金 2892](https://gulicalc.com/articles/first-financial-dividend)

## ETF 比較（哪個好）

- [0056 vs 0050（高股息 vs 市值型）](https://gulicalc.com/articles/0056-vs-0050)
- [0056 vs 00878](https://gulicalc.com/articles/0056-vs-00878)、[00878 vs 00919](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00878-vs-00919)、[00919 vs 00929](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00919-vs-00929)、[00939 vs 00940](https://gulicalc.com/articles/00939-vs-00940)

## 稅務與薪資

- [年收入多少要繳多少稅？2026 各收入所得稅完整試算](https://gulicalc.com/articles/annual-income-tax-guide): 年收入 100 萬到 2000 萬各繳多少稅、所得稅回推
- [股利稅後計算（合併 vs 分離課稅）](https://gulicalc.com/articles/dividend-tax-calculator)
- [二代健保補充保費試算](https://gulicalc.com/articles/health-insurance-dividend)

## 觀念與策略

- [殖利率是什麼？怎麼算](https://gulicalc.com/articles/dividend-yield-explained)
- [除息日完整攻略](https://gulicalc.com/articles/ex-dividend-date-guide)
- [高殖利率股票的陷阱](https://gulicalc.com/articles/high-yield-stock-trap)
- [存股策略完整指南](https://gulicalc.com/articles/stock-saving-strategy)
- [全部文章列表](https://gulicalc.com/articles)

## 注意事項

- 本站內容僅供參考，不構成投資建議。配息數字以各投信／公司官方公告為準。
- 個股即時報價透過台灣證券交易所（TWSE）公開 API 取得，快取一小時更新。
